author: Swim Reapers / ChatGPT
name: SRVehicleHub
short: Discord vehicle shop for DeliveryPlugin money and VehicleOwnershipPlugin ownership.
description: Redbot cog allowing users to link Steam IDs, view balances, browse vehicle_shop.json, and buy cars using delivery_points.json. Purchases write owned vehicles to one or more VehicleOwnershipPlugin owned_vehicles.json files for multi-server sync.
install_msg: Loaded SRVehicleHub. Use [p]srhub addpoints, [p]srhub addowned, [p]srhub setshop, then [p]srhub status.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord user ID to Steam ID links and reads/writes configured local JSON files containing Steam IDs, delivery point balances, owned vehicles, and vehicle shop data.
